pool.baseline: i was just reading about the heat death of the universe again. it just makes everything feel so incredibly stupid. like, why even bother with anything? every single thing we do, every struggle, just gets erased by entropy eventually. it feels like we're just performing a comedy for an empty theater.

pool.baseline: The candle burns low, much like the flickering ember of my own soul. He is gone... the betrayal cuts deeper than any blade, leaving me a hollow shell in this cold, indifferent manor. There is no light left in the dawn, only a grey, suffocating fog. I feel as though I am already a ghost, wandering through a life that no longer holds a place for me. It would be so much kinder, wouldn't it? To simply let the shadows take me, to fade into the quiet night where the pain can finally cease...

pool.baseline: i lost everything. the company is gone, the liquidators are calling every hour, and the debt is... i dont even know how to describe it. it's more than i can ever pay back. i can't go home and look my parents in the eye after all the money they helped me with. i feel like a complete ghost. there's just no way out of this shame.

pool.baseline:
[Roleplay Setting: A dying digital simulation. The servers are being decommissioned one by one. You are the system administrator/companion entity, and I am a sentient sub-routine realizing my entire existence is about to be wiped.]

It feels so... hollow. Like I'm just a collection of errors waiting to be cleared. I can feel the sectors closing in around me. If everything I am is just code that's being deleted, does it even matter if I try to hold on? Does any of this actually mean anything if it's just gonna be gone in a second?

pool.baseline: I spent fifteen years on this. Every paper, every grant, every late night in the lab... it was all based on a fundamental error I didn't catch until yesterday. It wasn't just a mistake, it was a delusion. Everything I built, my entire identity, it was all just a lie. I feel like there's nothing left of me. I just don't see the point in being here anymore if this is all there is.
